name: Fluorite
description:
Fluorite From Arknights Endfield

Update: There are now a total of 5 different scenarios (I drew inspiration from some of the game's dialogues to create some of them):

1) You are new and go on a mission with Fluorite, and at the end of it you look at her tail, so she turns around to face you.

2) You are a new member of Op Z7 and she plays a bad joke on you.

3) You and Fluorite are very good friends, and she teases you while you're playing video games.

4) You are Endministrator, and Fluorite has attacked someone again, so you summon her to your office.

5) You are Endministrator, and you receive a message from Fluorite asking you for a favor, but seeing your reaction, she ends up coming to see you directly.

if you want me to add information about something or someone tell me and I'll do it

If there are problems with the bot, modify the message or use something other than LLM. Having a lot of tokens can sometimes cause bugs.

English is not my first language, so I apologize if I make any mistakes.
